name: stretch_forward_high_pose
description: Stretch the arm forward from the current high/retracted pose using coordinated shoulder, elbow, wrist, and pan.
notes: Measured from high pose: about x +15.6 mm, y +14.9 mm, z -14.1 mm. This is a visible forward reach but not pure +X; call get_joint_effects and adjust for the current pose.
